name: stock-insight-analyzer
description: FANG+や個別米国株の分析ダッシュボード

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.test:run: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
